source_pr.title: infoschema: make the unit test of AnalyzeStatus robust.
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #15432 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: the unit test of AnalyzeStatus is not robust.

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed: make the unit test of AnalyzeStatus robust


Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

symptoms: PR body: the unit test of AnalyzeStatus is not robust.
failure_signature: PR body: the unit test of AnalyzeStatus is not robust.
root_cause_explanation: The test asserted exact rows from a shared system table (`information_schema.analyze_status`), which can contain entries from other tests and make strict row-count/content assertions flaky. This PR makes the test deterministic by using a unique table name and filtering/validating analyze_status by TABLE_NAME (presence/absence) instead of asserting the entire table contents.
fix_pattern: Use a unique table name and filter queries on shared system tables (analyze_status) instead of asserting exact full-table contents.

evidence: evidence: PR body: the unit test of AnalyzeStatus is not robust.

evidence: diff replaces strict row assertions with checking analyze_status emptiness before analyze and presence after analyze via distinct TABLE_NAME, making the existing test deterministic (executor/infoschema_reader_test.go).

analysis:
PR title: infoschema: make the unit test of AnalyzeStatus robust.
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/15439
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: PR body: the unit test of AnalyzeStatus is not robust.
Changed files (1): executor/infoschema_reader_test.go
Patch url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/15439.patch
Picked test: type=unit path=executor/infoschema_reader_test.go name=infoschema_reader_test
